//note1: Keys under `arduino.*` follow the VS Code Arduino extension
//note2: convention, so the same settings.json stays compatible with that
//note3: extension if it is installed. build.sh reads them directly and
//note4: does not depend on the extension being present.
//2: --- Optional: per-device USB identity (Earle Philhower rp2040 core) ---
//3: Host tools and `dmesg` / `lsusb` will report these strings. Useful when
//4: several boards with identical VID/PID are plugged in simultaneously and
//5: you want a human-readable way to tell them apart.
//7: --- Optional: persistent serial monitor preferred port (overrides arduino.uploadPort) ---
//8: --- Required for F5 debugging via Raspberry Pi Debug Probe ---
//9: openocd and arm-none-eabi-gdb ship with the arduino-pico core.
//10: Replace the `<version>` segments below with whatever arduino-cli
